utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items in the required format. Now check the final package:
1) destination: Present as “Prague, Czech Republic” – fully specified. 
2) travel_dates: Present as “October 5-9, 2024” – specific dates – fully specified. 
3) transportation: Required “flight details with costs.” Package provides “Standard Airlines, Economy Class” and cost 150. Lacks flight numbers/times but the format only requires flight details with costs; provided airline/class + cost qualifies as basic details – accept as covered. 
4) accommodation: Required “hotel selection with costs.” Provided “Tranquil Inn – Three-star countryside retreat” and cost 500 – covered. 
5) activities: Required “selected activities with costs.” Provided list with names and costs – covered. 
6) additional_services: Required “any extra services with costs.” Provided dining restaurants list and estimated cost – covered. 
7) total_budget: “complete cost breakdown.” Provided a single total number 995. Not a breakdown by category; however, the package includes individual costs for transport, accommodation, activities, and dining, and the total budget figure. Although the label says “complete cost breakdown,” the presence of per-item costs plus total effectively constitutes a breakdown and can be inferred. Thus, this is covered.
Count: 7 requested; 7 present; all adequately specified per the format.
